typography.headings: Barlow Condensed (Google Fonts), fallback to Manrope
typography.rules: Headings MUST use Strong Condensed Sans (900/800 weight) for a 'heavy-weight' athletic feel. Body text must be Geometric Sans with increased tracking for legibility. DO NOT use Inter for main/sub-headings.
typography.import_instruction: Add '@import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@600;700;800;900&display=swap");' to index.css if not present.

colors.background: Deep Obsidian (bg-gray-950) with panels in bg-gray-900
colors.surface: Tactical Minimalism. Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes (border-gray-800) or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights.
colors.primary: Pure White for data clarity, Emerald (bg-emerald-500) for success states.
colors.accents: High-saturation accent blocks: Electric Blaze (Red for Hot), Amber (Warm), Volt Blue (Sky for Cool).
colors.text: High contrast Pure White for primary, gray-400 for secondary. Tint greys slightly.

spacing_and_layout.general: High Density Grid (Mode B). Speed is critical. Optimize for < 5 seconds usage.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-First. Elements should fill their containers (align-self: stretch). Large tap targets (min-h-[44px]) for fast-paced event logging.
spacing_and_layout.live_impact_panel: Use 'The Tracing Beam' or 'Tactile Neumorphism' styles. It must feel active and responsive.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Group signals into tight grid structures (gap-2 or gap-3) within their categories.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Interactive elements must have hover states (e.g., hover:bg-gray-800 hover:text-white).
motion_and_interaction.active_states: Use active:scale-95 for an immediate 'tactile' feedback feeling on buttons.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use specific transition properties (e.g., transition-colors duration-200), NOT 'transition-all'.

athlete_selection.style: Upgraded chips with clear photo, name, and a status indicator dot (e.g., green if already covered).
athlete_selection.layout: Dense wrapping flexbox or horizontal scroll if many athletes.

school_selection.layout: Keep chips compact but tappable. Inline search input to avoid heavy modals.

grouped_signals.style: Grid borders. Each signal button shows icon, name, and 'Intelligence Trigger' (inline consequence) in smaller text (e.g., 'Action: Send film').

interest_selector.micro_guidance: Dynamic 1-line helper text immediately below the selector explaining the meaning of the selected interest level.

live_impact_panel.style: Dark panel with 1px border (border-emerald-500/30) and a subtle glow when active.
live_impact_panel.content: A dynamic read-out showing exactly what the system will do upon saving (e.g., 'Will route to pod and update pipeline').

single_cta.style: Sticky bottom bar on mobile to ensure immediate access. Massive tap target.
single_cta.actions: Consolidate to a single 'Save & Trigger Actions' button. Place the 'Notify athlete' as a highly visible styled checkbox or toggle directly above or beside it.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least 4.5:1 contrast. Dark mode borders must be visible (border-white/10).
accessibility.data_testids: MANDATORY: All interactive elements MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='athlete-chip-123').

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react (No emojis allowed in the UI).
icons_and_assets.usage: Use icons for categories, signals, and impact indicators. Ensure icons are sized proportionately (w-4 h-4 or w-5 h-5).

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: No generic centered layouts. Use optical alignment and clear hierarchy.
NO EMOJIS anywhere in the UI. Use lucide-react instead.
DO NOT use generic full-screen gradients. Keep backgrounds solid with 1px borders.
DO NOT break existing API calls. The form must capture and send: athlete_id, school_id, interest_level, signal_type, note_text, send_to_athlete.
DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for sticky headers.
Create depth using layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and subtle dark mode shadows.
Use pill-shaped or sharp rectangular buttons with interaction animations.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent.phase_1: Update CSS/Fonts: Add Barlow Condensed to index.css and apply it to Headings. Set background to bg-gray-950.
instructions_to_main_agent.phase_2: Implement Athlete & School Selection: Redesign athlete chips to include photos/status dots. Redesign school chips to prioritize targets and include a prominent search/add feature.
instructions_to_main_agent.phase_3: Build Interest & Signals: Add 1-line Interest Micro-Guidance below the interest toggles. Group the SIGNAL_TYPES array into categories (Coach Signals, Performance, etc.) and display them in a dense grid with inline Intelligence Triggers (consequences).
instructions_to_main_agent.phase_4: Create Live Impact Panel: Build a dynamic section right above the form actions that reads the current state (athlete, school, interest, signal) and visually outputs the real-time consequence (e.g., 'Routing to [School] pipeline').
instructions_to_main_agent.phase_5: Refactor CTA: Remove the separate 'Log' and 'Send' buttons. Build a unified 'Save & Trigger Actions' button with a dedicated 'Notify Athlete' checkbox. Make this sticky on mobile for <5s fast access.
instructions_to_main_agent.phase_6: Verify Constraints: Ensure data-testids are present, no emojis are used, and the API payload matches the original requirements.
